caption:
[CLSM] 五一国际劳动节是颂扬勤勉，致敬劳动价值的重要日子，旨在肯定社会各界劳动者为文明进步与国家繁荣所做出的卓越贡献。在这一天，人们不仅庆贺劳动的果实，更感悟不懈奋斗的力量。无论是在建设一线、医疗后勤，还是在守护安宁的岗位上，每一份付出都值得被铭记，每一份辛劳都在筑就更美好的未来。

多媒体大学(马六甲院校)华文学会谨此向大家致以诚挚的问候。愿大家在向劳动者 致敬的同时,也能在这个节日里收获片刻的宁静与充实,感受奋斗带来的尊严与成长 的喜悦。

“资讯领航,推广中华文化”

多媒体大学(马六甲院校)华文学会
第二十九届理事会 谨启

[CLSM] May 1st International Labour Day is a significant occasion to celebrate the spirit of diligence and honour the profound value of work. It serves to recognize the outstanding contributions made by workers from all walks of life toward social progress and national prosperity. On this day, we not only celebrate the fruits of our toil but also reflect on the power of unyielding perseverance. Whether on the frontlines of construction, in healthcare and logistics, or in roles safeguarding peace and security, every contribution is worthy of remembrance, as every effort helps build a brighter future.

Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) hereby extends its most sincere greetings to all. As we pay tribute to the spirit of hard work, may everyone find moments of peace and fulfilment during this holiday, embracing the dignity and joy of growth that stem from one's endeavours.

"Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture"

Regards,
High Committee of 29th Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

caption:
[CLSM] 清明节是中华传统文化中重要的节日之一，既是慎终追远、缅怀先人的日子，也是感受春意、亲近自然的时节。在这一天，人们通过祭祖追思、踏青赏春，表达对先人的敬意与怀念，同时体会万物复苏、春意盎然的生命气息。 

值此清明之际，多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会谨此向大家致以诚挚的问候。愿大家在追思先人的同时，也珍惜当下，感悟生命的珍贵与传承的意义。

“资讯领航，推广中华文化”

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会
第二十九届理事会 谨启

[CLSM] Qingming Festival, also known as Tomb-Sweeping Day, is an important traditional 
observance in Chinese culture. It is a time for honoring and remembering ancestors while also appreciating the renewal of nature in spring. On this occasion, people pay tribute to their forebears and enjoy spring outings, reflecting both remembrance and the vitality of life.

Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) wishes everyone a meaningful Qingming Festival. May this occasion be a time for reflection, remembrance, and appreciation of the enduring values of family, heritage, and life.

“Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture”

Regards,
High Committee of 29th Chinese Language Society,
Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

caption:
[CLSM] 开斋节（Hari Raya Aidilfitri）是穆斯林在完成斋月（Ramadan）后迎来的重要节日，象征着一个月的自律、虔诚与心灵净化的圆满结束。在这一天，人们通过祈祷、团聚与分享，表达对真主的感恩，并与家人朋友共度温馨时光。

开斋节不仅是庆祝的时刻，更承载着宽恕与和解的意义。人们彼此道歉、互相祝福，在包容与关爱中拉近彼此的距离。这一节日也体现了团结、尊重与多元文化共融的价值，让社会更加和谐与温暖。

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会谨此向所有穆斯林同胞致以最诚挚的祝福，愿大家在这个佳节中收获喜悦与平安，愿爱与希望常伴左右，万事顺遂。 🌙

“资讯领航，推广中华文化”

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会
第二十九届理事会 谨启

[CLSM] Hari Raya Aidilfitri is an important festival celebrated by Muslims following the completion of the holy month of Ramadan. It marks the fulfillment of a month of self-discipline, devotion, and spiritual purification. On this day, people express their gratitude to Allah through prayers, gatherings, and sharing, while cherishing meaningful moments with 
family and friends.

Hari Raya Aidilfitri is not only a time of celebration, but also carries the significance of forgiveness and reconciliation. People seek forgiveness from one another and exchange well wishes, strengthen bonds through compassion and understanding. This festive occasion also reflects the values of unity, respect, and multicultural harmony, contributing to a more 
peaceful and inclusive society.

Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) hereby extends its warmest wishes to all members of the Muslim community. May this festive season bring you joy and peace, and may love and hope always be with you. Wishing you success and happiness in all that you do. 🌙

“Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture”

Regards,
High Committee of 29th Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会谨此向所有穆斯林同胞致以最诚挚的祝福，愿大家在这个佳节中收获喜悦与平安，愿爱与希望常伴左右，万事顺遂。 🌙

“资讯领航，推广中华文化”

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会
第二十九届理事会 谨启

[CLSM] Hari Raya Aidilfitri is an important festival celebrated by Muslims following the completion of the holy month of Ramadan. It marks the fulfillment of a month of self-discipline, devotion, and spiritual purification. On this day, people express their gratitude to Allah through prayers, gatherings, and sharing, while cherishing meaningful moments with 
family and friends.

Hari Raya Aidilfitri is not only a time of celebration, but also carries the significance of forgiveness and reconciliation. People seek forgiveness from one another and exchange well wishes, strengthen bonds through compassion and understanding. This festive occasion also reflects the values of unity, respect, and multicultural harmony, contributing to a more 
peaceful and inclusive society.

Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) hereby extends its warmest wishes to all members of the Muslim community. May this festive season bring you joy and peace, and may love and hope always be with you. Wishing you success and happiness in all that you do. 🌙

“Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture”

Regards,
High Committee of 29th Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

[CLSM] Qingming Festival, also known as Tomb-Sweeping Day, is an important traditional

caption:
[CLSM] 大宝森节是印度教中一项重要而神圣的节日，通常在农历泰月（约公历一月至二月之间）的第一天举行，以纪念印度教 神穆鲁干神（Murugan）的诞辰。

在这一天，信徒们会通过禁食、祈祷及长途跋涉的方式，表达 神明的虔诚与感恩。部分信徒会背负象征奉献的卡瓦迪（Kavadi），或以身体承受考验，展现坚定的信念、忍耐与精神力量。这些仪式不仅是一种宗教实践，也体现了信仰中自律、奉献与内心修行的深刻意义。

大宝森节不仅是宗教庆典，更象征着信念的力量、心灵的净化，以及社群之间的团结与互相尊重。

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会谨此向所有印度同胞献上最诚挚的祝福，祝愿大家大宝森节平安喜乐，心愿圆满。

“资讯领航，推广中华文化”

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会
第二十九届理事会 谨启

CLSM] Thaipusam is an important and sacred festival in Hinduism, usually observed on the first day of the Tamil month of Thai (typically falling between January and February in the Gregorian calendar), commemorating the birth of the Hindu deity Lord Murugan.

On this day, devotees express their devotion and gratitude through fasting, prayers, and long-distance pilgrimages. Some devotees carry the Kavadi, a symbolic structure representing devotion, or undergo physical endurance as a demonstration of their strongfaith, perseverance, and spiritual strength. These rituals are not only religious practices but also reflect the values of self-discipline, dedication, and inner spiritual growth within the faith.

Thaipusam is more than a religious celebration; it symbolizes the power of faith, the purification of the soul, and the spirit of unity and mutual respect within the community.

Chinese Language Society of Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) hereby extends its warmest wishes to all members of the Indian community, wishing everyone a peaceful and joyous Thaipusam, and may all your heartfelt wishes be fulfilled.

“Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture”

Regards,
High Committee of 29th Chinese Language Society,
Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

caption:
[CLSM] 五一国际劳动节是颂扬勤勉，致敬劳动价值的重要日子，旨在肯定社会各界劳动者为文明进步与国家繁荣所做出的卓越贡献。在这一天，人们不仅庆贺劳动的果实，更感悟不懈奋斗的力量。无论是在建设一线、医疗后勤，还是在守护安宁的岗位上，每一份付出都值得被铭记，每一份辛劳都在筑就更美好的未来。

多媒体大学(马六甲院校)华文学会谨此向大家致以诚挚的问候。愿大家在向劳动者 致敬的同时,也能在这个节日里收获片刻的宁静与充实,感受奋斗带来的尊严与成长 的喜悦。

caption:
[CLSM] 大宝森节是印度教中一项重要而神圣的节日，通常在农历泰月（约公历一月至二月之间）的第一天举行，以纪念印度教 神穆鲁干神（Murugan）的诞辰。

在这一天，信徒们会通过禁食、祈祷及长途跋涉的方式，表达 神明的虔诚与感恩。部分信徒会背负象征奉献的卡瓦迪（Kavadi），或以身体承受考验，展现坚定的信念、忍耐与精神力量。这些仪式不仅是一种宗教实践，也体现了信仰中自律、奉献与内心修行的深刻意义。

大宝森节不仅是宗教庆典，更象征着信念的力量、心灵的净化，以及社群之间的团结与互相尊重。

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会谨此向所有印度同胞献上最诚挚的祝福，祝愿大家大宝森节平安喜乐，心愿圆满。

“资讯领航，推广中华文化”

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会
第二十九届理事会 谨启

CLSM] Thaipusam is an important and sacred festival in Hinduism, usually observed on the first day of the Tamil month of Thai (typically falling between January and February in the Gregorian calendar), commemorating the birth of the Hindu deity Lord Murugan.

On this day, devotees express their devotion and gratitude through fasting, prayers, and long-distance pilgrimages. Some devotees carry the Kavadi, a symbolic structure representing devotion, or undergo physical endurance as a demonstration of their strongfaith, perseverance, and spiritual strength. These rituals are not only religious practices but also reflect the values of self-discipline, dedication, and inner spiritual growth within the faith.

Thaipusam is more than a religious celebration; it symbolizes the power of faith, the purification of the soul, and the spirit of unity and mutual respect within the community.

Chinese Language Society of Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) hereby extends its warmest wishes to all members of the Indian community, wishing everyone a peaceful and joyous Thaipusam, and may all your heartfelt wishes be fulfilled.

“Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture.”

Regards,
High Committee of 29th Chinese Language Society,
Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

caption:

新春，是岁月更迭的起点，也是文化与情感延续的时刻。在马来西亚，多元文化交融之中，农历新年承载着团圆的温度与传统的记忆，让人与人之间的联系在佳节中更加紧密。

迈入2026年，骏马象征昂首向前的力量与不断突破的精神。愿新的一年里，我们怀抱坚定信念，在人生道路上勇敢驰骋，以行动迎接机遇，以努力书写新的篇章。

华文学会将继续以文化为桥梁，与大家携手前行，让中华文化在交流与传承中焕发新的生命力，共同创造更多值得铭记的时刻。

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会谨祝大家：马年顺遂安康，福气常伴，前程似锦，阖家幸福！

“资讯领航，推广中华文化”

The Chinese New Year marks not only the beginning of a new cycle but also a moment when traditions, memories, and connections come alive. In Malaysia’s multicultural society, this festive season brings people closer together, celebrating heritage, reunion, and shared joy.

As we step into the Year 2026, the horse represents determination, momentum, and the courage to move forward. May we embrace the year with confidence, pursue our goals with passion, and welcome every new opportunity that lies ahead.

The Chinese Language Society will continue serving as a platform for cultural appreciation and learning, working together with everyone to keep Chinese culture vibrant and meaningful in today’s world.

Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) wishes everyone a prosperous Year of the Horse filled with happiness, success and harmony with loved ones.

Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) wishes all our Muslim friends a smooth and blessed fasting month. Ramadan Mubarak!

骏马奔腾迎新岁, 瑞气祥云映春晖。本次活动旨在通过一系列精彩纷呈的表演与传统文化体验，让大家在欢腾喜庆的氛围中，感受中华文化的独特魅力，共同祈愿新的一年瑞气盈门，万事顺遂。

无论您是想体验浓浓的年味，还是想与朋友共聚一堂，这都是不容错过的美好时刻！

新春庆典 2026：“腾瑞” 活动详情如下：
日期： 2026年2月4日（星期三）
时间： 2.00 p.m. – 5.00 p.m.
地点： 大礼堂，多媒体大学（马六甲院校）
着装要求： 红色服装

！！！免费入场！！！

我们期待您的踊跃参与，与我们一同迎接充满希望的一年！

[CLSM] Galloping Horses, Reaching the Zenith. You are invited to our CNY Celebration 2026: “Zenith”!

With the spirit of galloping horses welcoming the new year and auspicious clouds reflecting the spring sunshine, the Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) cordially invites you to join our Chinese New Year Celebration 2026: “Zenith”!

This event aims to immerse everyone in a vibrant festive atmosphere through a series of spectacular performances and traditional cultural experiences. Let us explore the unique charm of Chinese culture together and pray for a year filled with prosperity and success.

Whether you are looking to experience the rich flavor of the New Year or simply want to gather with friends, this is a special moment you won’t want to miss!

CNY Celebration 2026: “Zenith” Details:
Date: 4 February 2026 (Wednesday)
Time: 2.00 p.m. – 5.00 p.m.
Venue: Main Hall (Persada Permata Dunia), Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)
Dress Code: Red Attire

!!! Free Entry!!!

We warmly welcome everyone to participate and celebrate this festive season with us. Let’s welcome a hopeful year together!

For further information, kindly contact:
Director: Gan Yik Lei 010-969 6021
Co-Director: Ong Jia Xuan 018-201 1445
Co-Director: See Yee Zhen 011-1439 3134

Thank you.

caption:
[CLSM] 开斋节（Hari Raya Aidilfitri）是穆斯林在完成斋月（Ramadan）后迎来的重要节日，象征着一个月的自律、虔诚与心灵净化的圆满结束。在这一天，人们通过祈祷、团聚与分享，表达对真主的感恩，并与家人朋友共度温馨时光。

开斋节不仅是庆祝的时刻，更承载着宽恕与和解的意义。人们彼此道歉、互相祝福，在包容与关爱中拉近彼此的距离。这一节日也体现了团结、尊重与多元文化共融的价值，让社会更加和谐与温暖。

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会谨此向所有穆斯林同胞致以最诚挚的祝福，愿大家在这个佳节中收获喜悦与平安，愿爱与希望常伴左右，万事顺遂。 🌙

“资讯领航，推广中华文化”

多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会
第二十九届理事会 谨启

[CLSM] Hari Raya Aidilfitri is an important festival celebrated by Muslims following the completion of the holy month of Ramadan. It marks the fulfillment of a month of self-discipline, devotion, and spiritual purification. On this day, people express their gratitude to Allah through prayers, gatherings, and sharing, while cherishing meaningful moments with 
family and friends.

Hari Raya Aidilfitri is not only a time of celebration, but also carries the significance of forgiveness and reconciliation. People seek forgiveness from one another and exchange well wishes, strengthen bonds through compassion and understanding. This festive occasion also reflects the values of unity, respect, and multicultural harmony, contributing to a more 
peaceful and inclusive society.

Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) hereby extends its warmest wishes to all members of the Muslim community. May this festive season bring you joy and peace, and may love and hope always be with you. Wishing you success and happiness in all that you do. 🌙

“Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture”

Regards,
High Committee of 29th Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

[CLSM] 多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会正在招收第21届《撒种》全甲小学生写作康乐营工委。此培训营由中国报主办、马六甲多媒体大学华文学会与马六甲技术大学中华文化学会共同协办，其目的于发掘及培养小学生的写作能力。《撒种21》的日期将定于2026年6月13日（星期六）。有兴趣的多媒体大学（马六甲院校）在籍学生可填写以下申请表格。位子有限，先到先得。赶紧加入我们吧！

线上申请表格链接：
https://forms.office.com/r/KfZXJx1rte

*备注：此线上申请表格仅开放至2026年1月11日 （星期日）下午4时正，请有兴趣者在日期截止前填写此表格。

欲知更多详情，请联络：
吴秀雯 018-773 4782
宋彦彤 017-630 1288

谢谢。

[CLSM] Chinese Language Society of Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) is now recruiting working committee for the “Writing Recreational Camp”. This camp is organised by China Press, co-organised by Chinese Language Society of Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) and Kelab Kebudayaan Dan Kesenian Cina UTeM, which aims to explore and develop the writing skills of primary school students. The date of the camp will be set on 13th June 2026 (Saturday). Students of Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) who are interested can fill in the following application form. Limited places, first come first served basis. Come and join us!

Online application form’s link is as follow:
https://forms.office.com/r/KfZXJx1rte

*Remarks: The online application form will only be available until 4.00 p.m. on 11th January 2026 (Sunday). Kindly fill in the online application form before the deadline if you are interested.

For further information, kindly contact:
Goh Siew Wen  018-773 4782
Soong Yan Tong 017-630 1288

Thank you.

caption:
[CLSM] 多媒体大学（马六甲院校）第二十九届华文学会将于2026年1月12日（星期一）起开始招收特别活动计划书。所有在籍的多媒体大学（马六甲院校）的学生都有资格呈交活动计划书。还在苦恼于没有平台举办一场属于自己的特别活动？那你绝对不要错过这千载难逢的机会！

若有兴趣成为活动策划人，请于2026年1月25日（星期日）晚上11时前将特别活动计划书电邮至clsmmumlk@gmail.com，并通知以下任何一位负责人以确认理事会已收到活动计划书。面试详情将另行通知。

特别活动计划书必须以中文清楚列明以下要点：
· 活动简介（日期、时间和地点）
· 宗旨与目标
· 筹委会架构（筹工委人数）
· 职责
· 活动流程（筹备流程及当天流程）
· 格式准确且附上详细的财政预算案
· 可能面对的问题与解决方案

如有更多疑问，请联络：
颜毓雷 010-9696021
薛禹政 011-14393134
王佳璇 018-2011445

谢谢。

[CLSM] 29th Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) will start recruiting special event proposals from 12nd January 2026 (Monday) and all enrolled Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) students are eligible to submit their event proposals. Are you still struggling to find a platform to organise a special event of your own? Then you definitely should not miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity!

If you are interested in becoming an event planner, please email your special event proposal to clsmmumlk@gmail.com by 11pm on 25 January 2026 (Sunday). Kindly contact the person in charge below after your submission to ensure the event proposal has been successfully received. Details of the proposal interview will be informed later.

Essential elements that must be included in the event proposal are as follows:
· Introduction of the event (Date, time and venue)
· Objectives and targets
· Organising committees’ structure (Number of all committees needed)
· Task arrangement
· Program flow (During preparation and event day)
· Detailed budget with correct format
· Problems that might be faced and solutions to solve

For any enquiries, kindly contact:
Gan Yik Lei 010-9696021
See Yee Zhen 011-14393134
Ong Jia Xuan 018-2011445

Thank you.

caption:
[CLSM] 多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会诚挚邀请您参加我们的新春庆典 2026 “腾瑞”！

骏马奔腾迎新岁, 瑞气祥云映春晖。本次活动旨在通过一系列精彩纷呈的表演与传统文化体验，让大家在欢腾喜庆的氛围中，感受中华文化的独特魅力，共同祈愿新的一年瑞气盈门，万事顺遂。

无论您是想体验浓浓的年味，还是想与朋友共聚一堂，这都是不容错过的美好时刻！

新春庆典 2026：“腾瑞” 活动详情如下：
日期： 2026年2月4日（星期三）
时间： 2.00 p.m. – 5.00 p.m.
地点： 大礼堂，多媒体大学（马六甲院校）
着装要求： 红色服装

我们期待您的踊跃参与，与我们一同迎接充满希望的一年！

欲知更多详情, 请联络：
总策划 : 颜毓雷 010-969 6021
副总策划 : 王佳璇 018-201 1445
副总策划 : 薛禹政 O11-1439 3134

谢谢。

[CLSM] Galloping Horses, Reaching the Zenith. You are invited to our CNY Celebration 2026: “Zenith”!

With the spirit of galloping horses welcoming the new year and auspicious clouds reflecting the spring sunshine, the Chinese Language Society, Multimedia University (Melaka Campus) cordially invites you to join our Chinese New Year Celebration 2026: “Zenith”!

This event aims to immerse everyone in a vibrant festive atmosphere through a series of spectacular performances and traditional cultural experiences. Let us explore the unique charm of Chinese culture together and pray for a year filled with prosperity and success.

Whether you are looking to experience the rich flavor of the New Year or simply want to gather with friends, this is a special moment you won’t want to miss!

CNY Celebration 2026: “Zenith” Details:
Date: 4 February 2026 (Wednesday)
Time: 2.00 p.m. – 5.00 p.m.
Venue: Main Hall (Persada Permata Dunia), Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)
Dress Code: Red Attire

We warmly welcome everyone to participate and celebrate this festive season with us. Let’s welcome a hopeful year together!

For further information, kindly contact:
Director: Gan Yik Lei 010-969 6021
Co-Director: Ong Jia Xuan 018-201 1445
Co-Director: See Yee Zhen 011-1439 3134

Thank you.

caption:
[CLSM] ❄冬至，是农历十一月的重要传统节日，象征昼短夜长、寒冬渐深，也寓意新一轮生机的开始。自古以来，冬至被视为团圆与感恩的日子，人们吃汤圆、饺子，祭祖祈福，寄托对家人的思念与对来年的祝愿。

值此冬至佳节，让我们一同感受传统文化的温度，传承节日的美好意义。

“资讯领航，推广中华文化”
多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会
第二十八届理事会 谨启

[CLSM] ❄The Winter Solstice, observed in the 11th lunar month, marks the shortest day and longest night of the year and symbolizes reunion, gratitude, and renewal. With a history spanning thousands of years, traditions such as enjoying dumplings and glutinous rice balls reflect wishes for warmth, unity, and good fortune.

On this special day, let us celebrate our cultural heritage and share the warmth of the season.

“Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture”
Regards,
High Committee of 28th Chinese Language Society,
Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)

caption:
[CLSM] 🔔圣诞节是一个充满爱、喜悦与分享的节日。在这个彩灯闪烁、歌声悠扬的季节，不仅是岁末欢聚的时刻，更是人们互相传递祝福、表达感恩的佳节。自古以来，虽然圣诞节源自西方，但在多元文化交融的今天，它已成为我们体验温情、共庆欢乐的重要时刻。

在这个特别的日子里，让我们在闪烁的圣诞树下许下心愿。愿每一份礼物都承载着惊喜，每一声祝福都化作冬日里最炽热的阳光。无论身在校园或家中，愿这份节日的温馨能驱散所有的疲惫。

值此圣诞佳节，让我们一同感受多元文化的魅力，分享节日的喜悦与平安。

“资讯领航，推广中华文化” 
多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会 
第二十九届理事会 谨启

[CLSM] 🔔Christmas is a season of love, joy, and sharing. As the bells chime and the streets light up with festive decorations, it is a time for heartfelt reunions and expressions of gratitude. While Christmas has its origins in the West, in our diverse society today, it has become a wonderful occasion for us to experience warmth and celebrate together.

On this special day, let us make a wish under the twinkling Christmas tree. May every gift bring a surprise, and every blessing turn into the warmest sunshine in winter. Whether you are on campus or at home, may the festive warmth wash away all your exhaustion.

On this festive occasion, let us celebrate the beauty of cultural diversity and share the joy and peace of the season together.

“Information Navigation, Promoting Chinese Culture” 
Regards, 
High Committee of 29th Chinese Language Society,
Multimedia University (Melaka Campus)
